name: The Astronomy Game
short_description: Explore the depths of outer space and experience the wonders of astronomy! Go on an adventure that will take you through the cosmos in Story Mode. Your lab partner's been kidnapped, and you must travel to an alien fortress to rescue him. Endlessly test your astronomy skills in Trivia Battle Mode.
detailed_description:
Learn about astronomy and experience the wonders of space!

Go on an adventure that will take you through the cosmos in Story Mode. Your lab partner has been kidnapped, and you must travel to an alien fortress to rescue him. Along the way, you will interact with 90+ educational simulations

Infinitely test your space skills in Trivia Battle Mode
